design_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Fitness Tracking with Cyberpunk Gaming
Content is King: The Map is the Hero
Zoom In: Focus on the Runner's Territory
Negative Space: Clean HUDs for visibility

textures.grid: linear-gradient(to right, #333 1px, transparent 1px), linear-gradient(to bottom, #333 1px, transparent 1px)

layout.grid_system: Bento Grid (Mode A for Marketing, Mode B for Dashboard)
layout.mobile_first: Stack vertically on mobile, expand to grid on lg screens

buttons.primary: rounded-full bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(204,243,129,0.4)] transition-all duration-300 font-bold uppercase tracking-wide
buttons.secondary: rounded-full border border-white/20 bg-transparent text-white hover:bg-white/10 transition-all

cards.base: bg-zinc-900/50 border border-white/5 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden relative group

inputs.style: bg-zinc-900/80 border-white/10 focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary rounded-xl h-12

hud.container: fixed bottom-8 left-4 right-4 md:left-1/2 md:-translate-x-1/2 md:w-auto md:min-w-[400px] bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 rounded-full p-4 flex justify-between items-center z-50

media.image_style: High contrast, neon lighting, motion blur, dark environments
media.icons: Lucide React (default), Phosphor Icons (for specific UI needs)

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the 'Intertia' brand with a dark, neon-accented aesthetic.
Use the 'Unbounded' font for all major headings to give a futuristic feel.
Ensure the Map component is the central focus of the 'Live Run' and 'Dashboard' pages.
Use 'Glassmorphism' for HUD elements overlaying the map.
Implement the 'Bento Grid' layout for the Dashboard stats.
Use the provided image URLs for placeholders where appropriate.
Strictly follow the color palette: Void Black background, Neon Lime primary.
Ensure all interactive elements have hover states and transitions.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Avoid generic 'AI slop' designs; push for high contrast and unique layouts.
Do not use gradients for dark colors; use solid deep blacks/grays.
Create depth with z-index and layered glass effects.
Do not use 'transition: all'; specify properties.
Do not center-align the main app container.
Use named exports for components and default exports for pages.
